prompt: [shot cut] Wide tracking shot of [character1] slipping behind a flickering vending machine, her silhouette outlined by the neon glow of a nearby advertisement for synthetic dopamine. [shot cut] Close-up of her gloved hand inserting a data chip into a hidden port beneath a trash can, the chip glowing blue as it connects to the city's underground network.

[shot cut] Medium shot of [character1] walking slowly toward the mansion's front door, her candle casting flickering shadows on the ivy-covered stone walls. [shot cut] Over-the-shoulder shot of [character2] stepping forward from behind the gate, his hand reaching out as if to call her name, but the words die in his throat as the wind howls.

[shot cut] Low-angle shot of [character1] stepping out of the car, his boots sinking into the sand, the heat distorting the air around him as he scans the horizon. [shot cut] Close-up of the approaching figure's boot kicking up dust, the briefcase clutched tightly, its contents glowing faintly through the cracked casing.

[shot cut] Medium shot of [character1] carefully brushing her glove over the glowing plant, the light responding with a ripple of color. [shot cut] Close-up of her helmet visor as a flicker of light from the alien structure reflects across the glass, followed by a faint, rhythmic hum resonating through the suit.

[shot cut] Wide shot of [character1] standing before a massive, ancient tree with a face carved into its bark, her staff glowing brighter as she speaks a soft incantation. [shot cut] Close-up of [character2] stepping forward from behind the mushroom, his translucent wings fluttering as he mimics her gestures with a playful grin.

[shot cut] Wide shot of [character1] crouched behind a dumpster, their back to the camera, as they interface with a flickering data terminal mounted on a rusted wall, neon reflections dancing across their hooded silhouette. [shot cut] Over-the-shoulder shot from behind [character1], showing their glowing wrist device projecting streams of code into the air as a red alert symbol flashes—suddenly, a drone whirs into view from the alley’s end.

[shot cut] Low-angle shot of [character1] stepping cautiously over a moss-covered stone, her breath visible in the cold air, the key clutched tightly as she approaches a buried mausoleum door. [shot cut] Close-up of the key sliding into the lock—suddenly, the door groans open, and [character2] rises from the shadows, his hollow eyes fixed on her as the fog swirls around his spectral form.
